tools.name: acoustic_fembem_lsqnonlin_multistart_artifact_gate
tools.title: MATLAB Nonlinear Least-Squares Multistart Artifact Gate
tools.description: Validates an attach-only shared MATLAB lsqnonlin replay, including zero-start collapse detection, independent multistarts, residual and projected-stationarity tolerances, analytic and finite-difference Jacobian checks, and safe Python Engine JSON serialization.

summary_json.description: Compact JSON metadata for an already executed shared-session lsqnonlin audit.
